body.title: CLOSED: CC session config — autocompact at 50%, cap MCP output, shell profile commit
body.result: CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE=50 + MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS=8000 + BASH_MAX_OUTPUT_LENGTH=20000 in ~/.bashrc + config/cc_env.sh committed to agent_datacenter for cross-machine sync
body.description:
Set CC session hygiene env vars in shell profile so they sync to other boxes via dotfiles commit: CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE=50 (compact at 50% context, not 95% default), MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS=8000 (cap noisy MCP responses), BASH_MAX_OUTPUT_LENGTH=20000 (cap terminal output). If no dotfiles repo, commit to `config/cc_env.sh` in agent_datacenter with source instructions.

**Affected files:** `~/.bashrc` or `~/.zshrc` (env var additions), or `config/cc_env.sh` in agent_datacenter
**Design rules:** idempotent (safe to source multiple times); comment each var explaining why
**Scope boundary:** IN — three env vars, commit so other boxes pick them up. OUT — no settings.json changes, no CLAUDE.md changes.
**Test plan:** `echo $CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE` returns 50 in new shell; vars present after shell restart
